interpretation: The initial broad envelope does not support an unconditional universal sign. Within fixed biological scenarios, many local cases retain their sign across the four predeclared response-function variants. Across deliberately contrasting biological scenarios, the sign is usually sensitive. This is the expected conditional-regime result, not a failure of the model. Unanimity over the tested set is not a proof of mathematical structural robustness.
warning: This is a qualitative finite tested-set and parameter-scenario sensitivity diagnostic. The neutral tolerance is an absolute numerical zero threshold on the declared score scale, not a biologically invariant neutrality band. The run is not calibrated from empirical effect sizes and does not estimate adaptation or population trait covariance.
